series_metadata.series_title: Records of Chargeables to Data Processing Services Users
series_metadata.series_description: Electronic & manual records used to document, calculate costs & bill program units for computer usage & data processing services. These records are also used for cost recovery, budgeting, or administrative purposes. Records Not Covered: Chargeback records subject to Federal audit requirements should be scheduled separately.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: audited by Auditor of State & audit is released & all descrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: audited by Auditor of State & audit is released & all descrepancies are resolved
